meta.title: Utsab Books and Printers — Ranibagiya, Sainamaina
meta.description: School books, stationery, printing and photocopy services in Ranibagiya, Sainamaina-1, Rupandehi. Check book availability online and ask us on WhatsApp.

services.title: Services — Utsab Books and Printers
services.description: Stationery, printing, photocopy, lamination, binding, school books and sports items in Ranibagiya, Sainamaina. Send us your print job on WhatsApp.

books.title: Look for Book — Utsab Books and Printers
books.description: Search school books from Nursery to Class 12 and check live availability at our shop in Sainamaina, Rupandehi.

contact.title: Contact — Utsab Books and Printers
contact.description: Find Utsab Books and Printers in Ranibagiya, Sainamaina-1, Rupandehi. Call, WhatsApp or visit us — map, landmarks and opening hours.

brand.name: Utsab Books and Printers
brand.tagline: Books, stationery and printing — everything for the school year, under one roof.

hero.title: Your bookshop for the whole school year
hero.subtitle: School books for Nursery to Class 12, stationery, printing, photocopy, lamination and binding — all at one trusted local shop.
hero.photoAlt: Utsab Books and Printers shop front in Ranibagiya, Sainamaina

banner.label: Notice
banner.text: New session books are arriving — ask about your school's full set!

photoStrip.interior: Inside the shop — shelves of books and stationery
photoStrip.stationery: Stationery section — pens, notebooks and geometry boxes
photoStrip.printing: Printing and photocopy corner of the shop

home.storyHeading: A neighbourhood shop, run by neighbours
home.story: From our counter in Ranibagiya we have been handing schoolbooks, copies and pens to the same families for years — first for the parents, now for their children. If it is on your school's list, we either have it on the shelf or we will tell you honestly when it arrives.
home.ownerPhotoAlt: The owner at the counter of Utsab Books and Printers

books.title: Look for Book
books.intro: Pick a class or type the book's name — see what's on our shelves before you walk over.
books.searchLabel: Search by book, subject or publisher
books.searchPlaceholder: e.g. English Made Easy, Maths, Sajha…
books.resultsCount: {count, plural, =0 {No books found} one {1 book} other {# books}}
books.unitsLeft: {count, plural, one {1 copy on the shelf} other {# copies on the shelf}}
books.waTemplate: Hello Utsab Books! Is "{title}" ({class}) in stock? — sent from the website
books.notifyDone: Noted! We'll message you on WhatsApp when it arrives.
books.notifyInvalid: That doesn't look like a Nepali mobile number — please check it.
books.notifyRateLimited: Too many requests from this connection — please try again in a while.
books.notifyError: Something went wrong. Ask us on WhatsApp instead — we reply fast.
books.promptEmpty: Choose your class above, or search the book's name.
books.noResults: Don't see the book? We may still have it, or we can order it for you.
books.noResultsWaTemplate: Hello Utsab Books! I'm looking for: {query}
books.offline: Live stock can't be checked right now — but the shelf is just a message away.

services.title: Our Services
services.intro: Four counters of one shop — pick a tab, see what's inside.

quote.heading: Ask for a print quote
quote.sub: Tell us about the job — we reply on WhatsApp with the price.
quote.name: Your name
quote.descriptionPlaceholder: e.g. 40-page project report, front page in colour
quote.hint: Opens WhatsApp with your details filled in — nothing is sent until you press send there.
quote.errRequired: Please fill name, phone and the job description.

contact.title: Contact Us
contact.landmark: On the main road at Ranibagiya, Sainamaina-1 — a short walk from Ranibagiya Chowk. Ask anyone for the books-and-printing shop.
contact.landmarkNote: Exact landmark directions are being confirmed with the owner.
